things.name: Boracay White Beach
things.description: 4km of powdery white sand with turquoise water - consistently rated Asia's best beach

things.name: Puka Shell Beach
things.description: Quieter north coast beach with natural shell formations and snorkelling

things.name: Windsurfing & Kiteboarding (Bulabog Beach)
things.description: World-class wind conditions make Bulabog one of Asia's top kite spots

things.name: Sunset Sailing on a Paraw Boat
things.description: Traditional outrigger sail to watch the famous Boracay sunset

things.name: Cliff Diving at Ariel's Point
things.description: Five levels of cliff diving and a cliff bar above the Sibuyan Sea

things.name: Crystal Cove Island
things.description: Day trip island with two marine caves and excellent snorkelling

things.name: Helmet Diving
things.description: Walk on the seafloor in a diving helmet - no scuba experience needed

things.name: D'Mall & Station 2 Dining
things.description: Boracay's main shopping and dining area with fresh seafood restaurants

things.name: Island Tricycle Night Tour
things.description: Night tour of Boracay by sidecar tricycle - local transport

things.name: Chori Burger
things.description: Filipino chorizo beef burger - Boracay's most popular street food snack
